item.title: Crashify AI
item.description: Website: https://crashify.ai Status: On hold Stack: TypeScript React Supabase Crashify AI is a website that lets you generate 10-part “../../posts/projects/crashify"crash courses.

item.title: AI Co-Founded
item.description: Website: https://aicofounded.com Status: On hold Stack: TypeScript React Supabase AI Co-Founded is a website that helps you generate business plans.
